main.description: The cross-player rollup — 'the world pulse'. A DISPOSABLE PROJECTION written to the service repo by the Director (a Jetstream consumer that folds the firehose of player com.minomobi.hoop.story.save records). NOT a source of truth: rebuildable by replaying Jetstream from cursor 0. rkey = 'self' (a singleton, last-write-wins). The truth stays in players' own repos; this only aggregates them so 'how many travellers have met the Keeper / been to chamber X' is one read instead of scanning everyone.

summaryJson.description: Readable rollup the client shows: {travellers, totalMet, topContent, topChambers, tierDist, xpSum}.

playersJson.description: The Director's working state: {did → {met, chambers, tier, xp}}, latest-wins per player. Recomputed each round; not for clients.

cursor.description: Jetstream cursor (unix microseconds) of the last folded event — where the next replay resumes.
